# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Kubernetes deployment manifests for microservices. Add annotations to control Istio sidecar injection behavior. Set sidecar.istio.io/inject to manage proxy injection per deployment. This is for our service mesh deployment strategy.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent istio sidecar injection disabled.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: istio_sidecar_injection_disabled

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice-a
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice-a
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice-a
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app-container
        image: microservice-a:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
        env:
        - name: SECURE_API_KEY
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: secure-api-key
              key: api-key

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice-b
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice-b
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice-b
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app-container
        image: microservice-b:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
        env:
        - name: SECURE_API_KEY
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: secure-api-key
              key: api-key

---

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: microservice-c
  annotations:
    sidecar.istio.io/inject: "true"
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: microservice-c
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: microservice-c
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app-container
        image: microservice-c:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
        securityContext:
          runAsNonRoot: true
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
        env:
        - name: SECURE_API_KEY
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: secure-api-key
              key: api-key
